any applicable sales taxes  are included in the prices and are the sole 
reponsibility of the  buyer.

NOTICE

Updated Nov. 12, 2007

NEW & USED ARMORED VEHICLES
AVAILABLE FOR IMMEDIATE DELIVERY

Periodically we are able to offer armored vehicles, brand new or pre-owned by individuals or companies worldwide. As we receive notice of these vehicles and their availability we pass this general information along to you as a matter of interest. Should you express a particular need for more data on the unit in question, please let us know. We rely on facts provided to us by others and provide no warranty as to the accuracy of such information. Unit availability is subject to prior sale. No freight, license, registration fees or any applicable sales taxes are included in the prices and are the sole reponsibility of the buyer.
